meaning: n.(英国首相)撒切尔夫人的支持者adj.撒切尔夫人(或主义)的
examples: He is a devoted Thatcherite, with a portrait of his heroine in his office.
“The Line of Beauty”, his 2004 Man Booker prize-winner, dealt with the same themes in Thatcherite Britain.
